name: Turkiaki Fiesta
recipeInstructions:
This recipe uses either ground or slivered turkey with oriental seasonings and vegetables. Ground turkey is widely available in Canadian supermarkets.
Add additional teriyaki sauce for a stronger flavor if desired, and serve over cooked rice.
Preparation time: 10 minutes; Cooking time: about 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a wok or non-stick skillet over high heat. Add the turkey and stir-fry for approximately 4 minutes, or until lightly browned. Stir in the teriyaki sauce, salt, and pepper. Add celery and green onion. Cover and steam for 4 minutes. Incorporate red pepper, snow peas, and water chestnuts; continue cooking, stirring occasionally, for another 6 minutes. Sprinkle with sesame seeds if using before serving.
